description: DataForSEO provides SEO, search, advertising, backlink, review, app, business, merchant, and AI-related marketing data through APIs and databases. Its products are used to retrieve structured data from search engines, marketplaces, and review platforms for analytics and automation.
summary: DataForSEO exposes a primary authenticated REST API at `https://api.dataforseo.com/v3` plus an official authenticated MCP server at `https://mcp.dataforseo.com/mcp`; no public GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
